label: Award
summary: A trophy-shelf block: one award image and the caption telling who gave it and when.
era: "This site won the Golden Floppy, March 1999", awards traded between webmasters like merit badges.

classes.name: rs-award
classes.role: trophy-shelf block for one award image

a11y: A <figure> with <figcaption>: the alt names the award, the caption tells the story.
